dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.budgetExceededBody: This month you've spent {{spent}} {{currency}} against a budget of {{budget}}.

more.signOutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to sign out?

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.instruction: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.haveCode: I already have a reset code
forgotPassword.sentBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a link to reset your password. The link is valid for 2 hours.
forgotPassword.tip: Open the email on this device or your computer and follow the link to choose a new password. Be sure to check your spam folder if you don't see it within a minute.
forgotPassword.resend: Didn't get the email? Try a different address

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.instruction: Paste the reset code from your email, then enter a new password for {{email}}.
resetPassword.instructionNoEmail: Paste the reset code from your email along with the email it was sent to, then enter a new password.
resetPassword.codePlaceholder: Paste the code from your email
resetPassword.codeHelp: Tip: the code is the long string after "code=" in the link the email sent you.
resetPassword.successBody: Your password has been changed. Sign in with your new password to continue.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.codeRequired: Please paste the reset code from your email.
errors.passwordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.

profile.validationFirstName: First name must be at least 2 characters
profile.validationLastName: Last name must be at least 2 characters
profile.phonePrefixHint: Prefix is derived from country. You type the remaining digits.
profile.dailyReminderHint: Notify me daily if I have not logged expense or income.
